INDEC IPC Nivel General Nacional, base dic-2016=100, monthly, series-tiempo API. Series id 148.3_INIVELNAL_DICI_M_26 verified at apply-time (2026-07-06) against 3 known published monthly variations: Dec-2023 +25.47% (published ~25.5%), Jan-2024 +20.61% (~20.6%), Feb-2024 +13.24% (~13.2%). start_date pins the capture to Dec-2023 onward per D5; refetch without start_date for full history if ever needed. Re-verified at Slice 3 apply-time (task 3.1, VERIFY-AT-APPLY, 2026-07-07) against all 12 known published monthly variations for calendar year 2024 (Jan +20.6% ... Dec +2.7%, INDEC's widely reported figures): every month matches within 0.1 percentage points. See etl/tests/test_ipc.py:: test_ipc_series_matches_known_published_2024_variations for the executable regression check. Verdict: series id confirmed correct, safe to use for the build-ipc rebase (task 3.3).
2023 Elecciones Generales, mesa-level results ZIP. ~28MB, verified reachable (200, content-length 28028857).
2023 Balotaje (segunda vuelta), mesa-level results ZIP. ~3MB, verified reachable (200, content-length 3014122).
2025 Elecciones Legislativas Nacionales, mesa-level results ZIP. ~13.5MB, verified reachable (200 after https redirect, content-length 13554180).

2023 PASO, mesa-level results ZIP. Official URL (argentina.gob.ar/sites/default/files/dine-resultados/2023-PROVISORIOS_PASO.zip) returns 404 as of 2026-07-06 -- this is the only surviving copy, via the Wayback Machine snapshot dated 2024-01-06 (the `if_` modifier serves the raw file without Wayback's HTML/JS injection). ~88MB (content-length 88157604 at the snapshot), can be slow to fetch from Wayback -- use a generous timeout and resume/retry.

notes: "Índice de Transparencia Fiscal Municipal – Provincia de Buenos Aires", publicado por ASAP (Asociación Argentina de Presupuesto y Administración Financiera Pública, Filial Provincia de Buenos Aires) -- una asociación civil/profesional, NO un ministerio. Informe de Mayo 2026 (datos al 1er trimestre 2026). Coronel Rosales: 81/100 ("Alto cumplimiento"), desglose en página 24. sha256 pre-verificado por el dueño del proyecto al leer el PDF primario: 689df97fe6f383a136d6a74c88cecce910b8e3f72e1385aa4e8253338aa723ae -- re-verificado bit a bit contra el archivo efectivamente descargado por este pipeline (task 1, VERIFY-AT-APPLY). [R2 upload pending: no credentials configured]

Mismo índice ASAP, informe anterior (Noviembre 2025): Coronel Rosales 70/100 ("cumplimiento medio"). Archivado para trazar la tendencia 70 -> 81 mostrada en /transparencia; no se usa ningún otro dato de este informe salvo el total y la categoría. [R2 upload pending: no credentials configured]

Raw WordPress REST API listing snapshot of every "documentos" post (Gobierno Abierto) -- archived verbatim, sha256-pinned, so `build-cadencia` derives the live per-ASAP-dimension publish cadence (latest period + lag) from a single provenance-tracked source, distinct from the individual PDF attachments already archived one-by-one under the `mcr-docs` capability. A listing change (document added/removed) is itself detectable via manifest content-drift, same as any other archived source. [content drift detected vs prior capture]

"Población" dataset, Dirección Provincial de Estadística (Ministerio de Economía de la Provincia de Buenos Aires) -- the SAME catalogo.datos.gba.gob.ar CKAN publisher already used for coparticipacion-viewer. Per-municipio series 2010-2025; the dataset's own CKAN notes (verbatim): "Datos relativos a la población de la Provincia (Censo 2010 y Censo 2022) y su proyección" -- only the 2010 and 2022 columns are actual Censo Nacional de Población, Hogares y Viviendas counts, every other year is a linear interpolation/projection. This build (feature H3a, per-cápita coparticipación) uses ONLY the 2022 column, filtered to the same municipios as coparticipacion-viewer (TARGET_MUNICIPIOS, the single source of truth). Cross-verified at apply-time (2026-07-08): Coronel Rosales's 2022 value (67.503) and 2010 value (62.152) both match, digit for digit, an independent press report (radiofm2001.com.ar, citing La Nueva / INDEC's official "datos definitivos del Censo 2022" release, published 22/11/2023) -- see etl/etl/poblacion.py's module docstring for the full verification note. [R2 upload pending: no credentials configured]

Boletín Oficial de la Provincia de Buenos Aires, edición 18/07/2023 (Año CXIV, Nº 29548), Sección Oficial - Sociedades. Contiene el edicto de constitución de EQUIPO DE SERVICIOS PORTUARIOS RUMAX S.R.L. (instrumento privado del 29/6/2023) -- socios Juan Esteban Iglesias (50%, socio gerente) y Maximiliano Marcelo Márquez (50%), curados en etl/titularidad.yaml. This URL returns the FULL day's Sección Oficial PDF (189 pages, every entity published that day), not a RUMAX-specific sub-document -- the source exposes no narrower URL. Verified live 2026-07-09: the PDF carries a real, searchable text layer (pdftotext extracts ~843KB across 189 pages, including the RUMAX paragraph verbatim) -- NOT a scanned image as an earlier internal note assumed; corrected here rather than left inaccurate. A full-document parser is deliberately NOT built: this single PDF also carries hundreds of unrelated people's DNI, domicilio and estado civil across every OTHER entity's edicto published the same day -- only the one verified RUMAX record is hand-curated for publication (minimization by construction, see titularidad.py). [R2 upload pending: no credentials configured]
